body:
This PR makes thermodynamics entirely functional (closes #273). The old `PhasePartition` and state methods are retained for the time being for backward compatibility, until ClimaAtmos, ClimaCoupler, ClimaLand etc. are updated. They are in files called `depr_*`, which we will delete then. (The code works without these files.)

There are a few (smaller) breaking changes:
- Renamed `specific_enthalpy*` to `enthalpy*`.
- Renamed `specific_entropy*` to `entropy*`.
- Renamed `dry_pottemp` to `potential_temperature`
- Removed `q_vap_saturation_generic`. Use `q_vap_saturation` instead.
- Removed `universal_gas_constant` (or `gas_constant`), `molar_mass_dryair` and `molar_mass_water` from thermo parameters.
- Removed `phase_type` from `relative_humidity`.
- Renamed `latent_heat_liq_ice` to `humidity_weighted_latent_heat`.

Also
- Simplifies CI (closes #271)
- Removed warnings/errors from saturation adjustment and replaced by converge flag (closes #223)
- Removes clippings (except in diagnostic quantities, such as relative humidity, closes #292)
- Fixes a few bugs (e.g., in the use of `liquid_fraction` in nonequilibrium conditions, derivatives used in saturation adjustment), which may affect model behavior.
title: Make Thermodynamics functional again and remove reliance on PhasePartition and ThermoStates
